# Codexus

Codexus is a harness engineering layer for OpenAI Codex CLI. It keeps the local
Codex engine and authentication boundary, then adds durable run ledgers,
verification gates, bounded repair loops, session evidence, memory, and
truthful status reporting.

## Start Here

- [Project LLM Wiki](docs/project-wiki/README.md): checked-in project-management context for maintainers and LLM agents.
- [Current State](docs/project-wiki/current-state.md): what is stable, experimental, and gated.
- [Operating Model](docs/project-wiki/operating-model.md): evidence rules and completion standards.
- [Release Management](docs/project-wiki/release-management.md): release gates, version policy, and post-publish evidence.
- [Agent Onboarding](docs/project-wiki/agent-onboarding.md): first-read checklist for LLM agents.

## Source Truth

- [README](README.md): public project overview and install instructions.
- [Documentation Index](docs/README.md): full documentation map.
- [Implementation Status](docs/implementation-status.md): current implemented surfaces and known gaps.
- [JSON Contract](docs/json-contract.md): frozen stable JSON fields and stability markers.
- [Release Policy](docs/release-policy.md): release cadence and executable release policy.
- [Remaining Work](docs/remaining-work.md): active backlog and deferred surfaces.
- [Roadmap Kanban](docs/roadmap-kanban.html): four-column roadmap board.

## Boundary

This file is a navigation aid. It is not a completion authority. If it disagrees
with code, tests, schemas, release workflows, or release evidence, update this
file.
